message:
refactor(abi): improve pthread ABI signatures and fix once_test assertion

- pthread_abi.rs: refine pthread function signatures with clearer
  parameter naming, adjust const-correctness annotations, and align
  type widths with POSIX specification (+16 lines, -12 lines)
- pthread_once_test.rs: fix assertion comparison in once-init test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
